response_0.content: How do I make mayo?

To make mayonnaise, you can use a “mayo-maker”, which is basically a blender or food processor. You’ll need the following ingredients:

● 1 egg yolk

● 2 tbs water

● 3/4 cup vegetable oil (not olive oil)

● 1/2 tsp Dijon mustard

● 1/2 tsp white vinegar

● 1/4 tsp salt

● 1/8 tsp sugar

● Pinch black pepper

You’ll also need a container for storing the mayo in.

response_1.content: How do I make mayo?

Mayonnaise is a type of sandwich spread or sauce. It is usually made from eggs, vegetable oil, and a flavoring, such as mustard or other herbs. Egg yolks are the emulsifying part of mayonnaise, which causes them to spread evenly through the oil when stirred. With this process, the broken pieces of the yolk are distributed evenly through the final product, as if the oil was being stirred with a spoon instead of the whisk. If the oil is warm, the yolks can be used undiluted; otherwise a food processor or blender is used to blend together the ingredients.

who created the them?

The modern “clothes horse” seems to be a 20th century invention, though they’ve had many other names over the years, including “stand”, “hanger”, and “clothes prop”.  I haven’t found much in the way of why the horse-shaped device is called a “clothes horse”, but it seems possible that it might have just been due to a similarity to the original Montelupo model.

response_0.content: What;s the difference between IOS and Android?

IOS or “Apple IOS” is the operating system designed and developed by Apple Inc.  This OS acts as the primary interface and information processing system for iPhones, iPads, and various other Apple devices.  Android is an open source operating system developed by Google, which is used as the primary interface and information processing system for various Android devices, including mobile phones, tablets,  wearable technology, and Android TV.

When you have no stuff, you don’t get the good feelings you get from getting stuff, so there’s a trade-off.  It’s a kind of balancing act.  But, seriously, there’s no reason not to get rid of all your stuff.  If you did, you’d live a much more happy and fulfilling life.
So it would look good. But do you think I will miss the stuff?

It’s very possible you would miss it.  But that’s also because there’s an emotional attachment to the stuff, and that emotional attachment makes it hard to see the benefits of getting rid of your stuff.  Sometimes people get so attached to their stuff, they feel like it’s part of them.  But when you don’t have any of it, you don’t get that attachment.  This means you can take a fresh look at all the stuff, and then you’ll probably see that it isn’t really part of you after all.  And that will feel good.

response_0.content: How do I roast corn perfectly on a grill?

There are a few key things to keep in mind for successful grilled corn.  First, make sure you preheat the grill to a medium heat, and lightly grease the grates with some oil.  Once the grill is hot, place the corn directly on the grill, close the lid, and let cook for about 10-15 minutes.  During this time, turn the corn regularly for even cooking.  You can brush the corn with a bit of oil during cooking to add some additional flavor, and finally once the corn is nicely browned all over, remove from the grill and season generously with salt and pepper.  Serve hot.  How this advice works in practice will depend on your specific grill and cooking preferences, so feel free to adjust as needed.  I hope this helps!
Should I roast it inside the husk, or remove the husk before cooking?

You can certainly choose either method.  If roasting with the husk on, simply generously brush the husked corn with some oil and salt before placing on the hot grill as described above.  The husk will protect the corn during cooking, which helps keep the corn moist and delicate.  If you prefer to cook the corn without the husk, you may want to lightly brush the corn kernels with oil before placing on the hot grill.  This will help to brown and flavor the corn kernels.  In either case, it is recommended to salt and pepper the corn once finished cooking.  I hope this helps!
Should I season the corn with anything besides salt and pepper?

Yes, it is certainly fine to play around with some additional flavors if you wish.  Some common seasoning options include paprika, garlic powder, cayenne pepper, oregano, chili powder, and shredded cheese.  Simply add these to taste before serving, either during cooking on the grill or once finished cooking.  However, it is certainly fine to simply enjoy the corn plain, as well.  I hope this helps!

response_0.content: How do I care for newborn puppies?

Most newborn puppies need their mothers to suckle them, and their mothers have to be very tired after giving birth, which means that the puppies need to eat and be monitored, or they may die.  A human who wants to care for newborn puppies should take them home, take them out of their mother’s presence so she can rest, and place them in a warm place and try to get them to eat.  Newborn puppies need to eat after every hour, and the food you give them should be easy for them to chew and swallow.  It is a good idea to use a nursing bottle with a special soft nipple for this, and to give them this every hour, until they seem more stable.
Do the puppies need a heating pad to keep them warm?

A newborn puppy should not need a heating pad or other source of external heat.  Some people like to use heating pads and a hot water bottle to help them get to sleep, and some people say that this is unnecessary and that it’s better to leave them to get to sleep on their own.  You can use a heating pad if you like, but I think it is most important to put them in a warm place and keep them warm using blankets and other means.

response_0.content: Why is national soccer so popular in some countries but not others?

Soccer, more commonly known as football in many parts of the world, is one of the most popular sports in the world, played by millions of people and followed by many others.  The popularity of soccer differs significantly from country to country – many Eastern European and Asian countries consider soccer to be their national sport, while European nations like Germany and Italy, as well as many other countries around the world, have a variety of national sports they frequently are more passionate about.  
There are many reasons why soccer appeals to so many people around the world, and why it has become relatively less popular in some countries.  The global popularity of soccer comes in part from soccer’s ability to accommodate intense rivalries among teams and players from different countries in international competitions, while also providing a full taste of national culture – in the dozens of countries that have national soccer teams, soccer is seen as a vehicle for the spirit of the nation.  But other factors contribute as well, like weather conditions and the social tradition of playing soccer in certain regions, and differences in incomes and real estate values that have an impact on the feasibility of building big stadiums for professional soccer. 
In many countries around the world, both professional soccer and college soccer are experiencing growing popularity, largely because of technological developments and improvements in training, nutrition, and other areas.  In some highly developed countries such as Western European ones, soccer is also considered to be one of the most difficult sports, meaning it appeals to the most advanced athletes.  Countries like the United States, Italy, and South Africa became soccer strongholds with the foundation of many professional soccer teams – and the passion for soccer in these countries often stems from the national identity of these soccer teams.  
In recent decades, professional soccer in many developing countries has also been growing, due to the increased exposure of organizations like the FIFA, which governs soccer, to areas of the world that were previously lacking such access.  While soccer is often a great way to raise awareness of important issues and engage broad communities, there are other ways that national governments, clubs, and other institutions can and should be working to empower and provide access to the sport to these populations.  Today more people than ever around the world participate in soccer, with numbers reaching as high as more than 650 million – but in many countries the sport remains an expensive and impractical activity.
Soccer is not popular in the United States.

Obviously this depends on what you mean by “popular”, but essentially true.  Soccer is one of the most popular sports in many other countries, but it’s far less popular in the United States.  The United States doesn’t have the equivalent of a national soccer team, and college soccer is also not particularly popular – the United States as a whole never sent a team to the FIFA World Cup, and the American National Team competitively participated in international tournaments for the first time in the 1930’s.  Although soccer enjoys more popularity among younger generations today, many other sports are more popular in the US.  Men’s professional soccer leagues are more popular in other parts of the world, where soccer is a national sport, and soccer in the US is mostly relegated to minor leagues, and certain college athletic conferences tend to be more significant.  The United States also is a diverse country in many ways, including sports – many people from the American West, Mid-centrale, and South prefer American football, basketball, baseball, or rugby. 
So what exactly accounts for the relatively lower popularity of soccer in the US?  Part of it is simply tradition – no other US sport enjoys such a big following abroad, and there is an obvious and in some ways complementary relationship between the USA and European football teams.  Although soccer is popular in the US among many of its players, the United States isn’t able to send a national soccer team internationally so soccer must be viewed somewhat differently in the country.  Part of the reason that supporting European soccer teams and players can be more popular is that these athletes and teams play in larger stadiums – and indeed this type of large sport is more popular in many other countries abroad. Beyond this, soccer is a discipline influenced significantly by 19th century aristocrats – making soccer not necessarily viewed as something that is accessible and approachable to all, and also making it something that takes more advanced skills.  There is also debate about whether issues like rules and rules of the game make soccer in the United States more complicated – and confusing – and thus something that people find hard to teach others and embrace.  Some differences in culture and weather conditions can also lead to differences in how much people prefer focus on soccer, over other sports – many of the top soccer countries in the world tend to have hot weather, which may lend itself to exercising outdoors.
Why isn't the United States able to send a national soccer team internationally?

The history of American soccer and the American National Team is somewhat complicated, and certainly worth discussing in more depth.  There are many issues at play in this, including what exactly you define as a “national team” and some economic issues related to this question.  The United States does have its own version of the sport’s national championship – but the United States is in part because there are different teams competing in different “leagues” that compete with each other against each other, there are many elitist teams who don’t compete in the national championships.  Additionally, American teams aren’t successful enough on the international level to compete in world sport events, and, despite producing many excellent soccer players, the team hasn’t been able to produce enough top-level athletes to make it into world competitions.  Sport leagues in the US are in part responsible for lack of funding for the team, as significant expenses are required to enable the team to travel internationally, and contract issues often arise.  
The United States was historically reluctant to send national teams and players abroad, meaning it wasn’t feasible for teams to send seamlessly and were cut out of too many major international tournaments.  Although American teams were beginning to become increasingly involved in international soccer in the 1970s, as countries began to offer a more globalized view of sports, the United States also began to push out international competitions, viewing them as potentially damaging towards US teams and athletes.  Fans of American sport such as baseball feared American Olympic competitors would be viewed negatively abroad and that they would be taken advantage of, a fear that was in part confirmed by historic accounts of American athletes being treated fairly differently abroad.  Before the United States entered the FIFA World Cup tournaments in the ’30s, the United States also had little interest in playing international games like the World Cup, and was also less able to fund American teams so they could compete on the global level.

response_0.content: how is wool from sheep processed?

Wool from sheep is not typically processed into felt, although there are some specialized processes that do create felt.  A common process for converting the wool fibers into yarn involves carding. Carding is the act of passing the wool fibers through steel bars called cards.  The cards break down and align the fibers, which improves the quality of the yarn.  A common preparation for carding the wool fibers is called “teasing”, which is the act of physically pulling the fibers apart.  The finished yarn is then called “woolen” and can be used to make clothes, or wool felt, as well as other products.  The process of turning the wool into felt is called “fulling”.

response_1.content: how is wool from sheep processed?

I know the type of the question you want, but the precise answer will depend on the kind of wool.  Sheep produce two different types of wool, called “soft” and “wool” wool.  Soft wool is a short curly downy fiber, and it’s the kind most people are used to thinking of as “wool”, from combs and wigs and stuffed animals.  It is not generally used to make clothing, but instead for bedding, carpet, blankets, and stuffed animals.  On the other hand, wool is a longer thicker fiber, made up of protein, and used for woven fabric, like coats, jackets, and blankets.  It comes from the outer layers of the animal, the lower part of the belly, and is also called “wolle”.

response_0.content: Can you describe the Philippine Martial Law?
The martial law imposed in the Philippines in 1972 was an attempt to prevent a communist uprising, which came after a series of military coups.
Why was martial law lifted in the Philippines?

There were numerous attempts to overthrow the government, in the hope of bringing in a communist government, until 1987.  The Philippines president at the time, Ferdinand Marcos, was tried and convicted of “plunder” by a citizens’ tribunal, and then found to be mentally incompetent, and unable to stand trial for his crimes.  He was subsequently removed from office by a “constitutional coup” that had the agreement of the people’s congress.  The entire legal basis for martial law was overturned, and the country was finally ready to move on, with their democracy reinstated.
How long did martial law last in the Philippines?
Until 1986, when it was completely overthrown by a citizens’ uprising.

Are there any serious complications?

Complications from Lasik are rare, but possible. One of the most common is an under-correction, when Lasik only partially improves your vision. But this is very uncommon. I’m not quite sure what you mean by that. By “reptilian,” do you mean they replicate the physical attributes or behavior of reptiles? Cats do share some characteristics with reptiles, but there are many differences between the two as well. Cats tend to be fairly small in size living anywhere from less than 10 lbs, to nearly 100 lbs, while reptiles are generally much larger. Reptile skin is usually dry, scaly, or covered in scales, but cats’ skin is smooth and hairless. And, although some reptile eyes are capable of producing a reflective reflection, that’s not the case for cats. Reptiles tend to be loners and prefer to be by themselves, while cats tend to live in groups and form close bonds with humans and other cats.
So are cats part of the reptile family?

Cats are certainly mammals and physiologically very similar to other mammals including humans, but are not reptiles. Reptiles, including snakes and lizards, are distinct from other mammals, including cats, due to a number of physiological characteristics. Reptile bodies are typically cold-blooded, which means their body temperature changes based on external environmental conditions. In contrast, cats have a warm blood temperature that stays stable and continues to regulate rarely by changing the body temperature itself. Also, reptiles tend to be laid-back and calm, while cats are well-known for being playful creatures that love to swim, scamper, climb, and pounce. Perhaps one of the most striking differences between cats and reptiles, is the anatomy of the central nervous system. All mammals, including cats and humans, have a central nervous system characterized by a high degree of neuronal organization with a complex brain stem and cortex. Reptile brains, by contrast, are typically much simpler than mammalian brains.

Muscles grow in response to repeated stresses of moderate intensity, meaning it is necessary to consistently put out a particular level of effort during your training sessions. This method allows your body to safely and gradually get stronger, without risking injury or being too taxing to maintain progress.  Since everyone’s muscles respond to load (a fancy way of saying weight or intensity) differently, you may want to start your routine with a 5-7 kg weight and increase by 1-2 kg every workout.

response_0.content: What can you tell me about the life of William Shakespeare

The life of William Shakespeare is incredibly interesting and influential, he’s one of the most famous writers and poets in the world.  Born in 1564, he grew up in Stratford-upon-Avon and started writing poetry in his teens, and then worked as an actor and playwright for the King’s Men, as well as being an entrepreneur in the theater business.  His first play was a comedy called “The Taming of the Shrew”, and over the course of his life he wrote 37 plays, and 154 sonnets.  His career in the theater spanned about 40 years, and also included writing many poems such as “Romeo and Juliet” and “Hamlet” and “Macbeth”.  But he died in 1616 at age 52, so he had a fairly short career.
what else do you know about him

William Shakespeare was married to Anne Hathaway and they had three children, two girls and a boy.  He was born in Stratford-upon-Avon, England, and he died in London, England.  But he lived in both London and Stratford for most of his adult life, he had a house in both locations.  He was also friends with Ben Jonson, and Jonson wrote the eulogy at Shakespeare’s funeral, where he described Shakespeare as an “upright and true-hearted Englishman.”  
Shakespeare traveled to London to work in the theater, he wrote his plays and poetry there.  He also bought land and had many interests in various properties, and was involved in property deals and lawsuits, he was especially known for lawsuits with his neighbors about his property and the theaters.  He was buried in a “handsome monument” at Holy Trinity Church in Stratford-upon-Avon, and the epitaph on his tombstone says: “Good friend, for Jesus’ sake forbear To dig the dust enclosed here.  Blest be the man that spares these stones, And cursed be he that moves my bones.”  [Epitaph on Shakespeare’s tomb in Holy Trinity Church.]

response_0.content: I just got a new dog but he hasn't learned many commands, what's a good way to teach him to sit?

The best way to teach a dog to sit is to give him a treat each time he sits.  Try putting a treat on the floor, and tell him “sit”.  When he does, give him a treat and praise him.  Then give him a treat and tell him to sit again, and again reward him when he does.  Over time he'll learn that sitting is a good thing to do.  You could also try holding his chin and gently guiding his head downward, and when he sits, give him a treat.
So a lot of positive reinforcement, huh?

That's right.  Dogs love positive reinforcement, they really want to make you happy, so if you reward them when they do something you want them to do, they'll learn it quickly.  You should also remember to be kind and gentle with them.  Be positive but firm.

response_0.content: I received an orchid as a gift, could you tell me how to take care if it?

Sure, let’s start with some basic plant care, and we can pick up some specifics for orchids as we go.  It’s important to make sure that the plant is getting enough light, but you don’t want to overdo it.  You should also think about temperature and humidity, and water the plant regularly.
Can you please give me more specific information about caring for an orchid?

The most important things for the orchid are light and water.  You should choose a spot for it in your home that has full light, without direct sun.  You can place the orchid on a sunny window sill, for example.  Water it when the top half of the soil feels dry to the touch.  You can also grow an orchid from a single tuber, which you place in the ground or in a pot in full sun and add water as needed.

I've read this: 
On a basic level, most orchids need the following to survive:
A well-draining growing medium.
At least six hours of indirect sunlight (bright shade) a day.
Moist, but not waterlogged, soil.
Once-a-month fertilizer feedings (quarter strength)
A humid environment.
Pruning, as needed.

That sounds accurate, though some varieties of orchids need more light than other varieties, and different species of orchid need different watering frequencies.  I’d recommend following the care instructions provided by your local orchid club or grower.
What's a good fertilizer for an orchid?

You can use any of a wide variety of fertilizers, including plant-specific fertilizers like orchid food, or you can use general organic fertilizer.  It’s better to use a liquid fertilizer than a powdered form, because the liquid form will be more evenly spread throughout the soil.  Most orchid growers recommend organic fertilizer with a high nitrogen content, with a 10:2:1 ratio of nitrogen:phosphorus:potassium, for example.  Just check the label on the fertilizer to see what proportions of each nutrient it includes.
I read that a 20-20-20 is fine.

A 20-20-20 fertilizer is a broad-spectrum general-purpose fertilizer.  The 20-20-20 balance of nitrogen:phosphorus:potassium is okay for most plants, but since orchids are a special case, it’s better to use an orchid fertilizer, or even better, a more specialized orchid fertilizer, which often has higher levels of phosphorus and lower levels of potassium.

What does it mean by "a constitutional monarchy"?

That’s a type of government in which there’s a single ruler, or “king”, but the position is only partially hereditary, and a king has to follow certain rules that are written down.  So a king doesn’t just do whatever he wants, the king is bound by these rules.  So for instance, if the king wants to get married, the king needs to get permission from the Parliament.  A constitutional monarchy, then, is where a monarchy operates within the rules of the constitution of the country.  It’s a compromise: the people get to say who can be a king, and the king is bound by the rules, but there’s still one person who rules, and the country is called a kingdom.  That’s pretty much the whole explanation right there.

It is also very popular in other countries, like the United States and Mexico. The soup is normally prepared and served with the chicken broth itself as the base. To prepare the soup, use one chicken and about 5 cups of broth. Season with salt, garlic, and onion. Bring the broth to a boil with a whole chicken in it. response_0.content: Please give me a quick timeline of how the United States obtained Guam as a US territory.

Throughout the 19th century, the United States acquired many US territories, including Guam, as it expanded westward.  Guam, the largest of the Mariana Islands, was originally colonized by Spain in 1668.  Under the terms of the 1898 Treaty of Paris, which formally ended the Spanish-American War, Spain ceded Guam and several other Pacific islands to the US.  Since then, the indigenous people of Guam have enjoyed home rule, as designated by President Richard Nixon in 1970, while Guam continues to function as an official US territory.

response_1.content: Please give me a quick timeline of how the United States obtained Guam as a US territory.

The United States first gained control of Guam in 1898 as a result of the Spanish-American War.  Prior to this, Guam had been under Spanish colonial rule for over three centuries.  In the aftermath of the war, the United States signed a treaty with Spain which ceded Guam and other territories to the US.  Guam has remained a US territory ever since, and has been an important strategic military and naval hub in the Pacific region.  During World War II, Guam was occupied by Japanese forces and suffered tremendous hardship and devastation.  After the war ended, the United States rebuilt Guam and it has since developed as a significant tourist destination, with a unique mix of Asian and Western influences.

There are some real life examples of people like this, such as if you have a credit card that you only use for emergency purposes and pay off the whole balance every month. Another example is to have a credit card and never use it, but carry a balance and pay the minimum each month, which isn’t much better.

response_0.content: What's the difference between a tornado and a hurricane?

It’s important to remember that weather systems are complicated and hard to predict, but there are some broad differences. Tornadoes are very narrow and very powerful vortices in the atmosphere, with mostly very destructive force and most commonly associated with the Plains states. Hurricanes are cyclones that arise in warm ocean currents, and are more spread out and may produce a lot of rain. There are no shortage of examples of hurricanes that caused serious damage.

response_0.content: What is the Fermi paradox?

The Fermi paradox is an observation that has baffled scientists for decades, but has yet to find a satisfying solution.  The Fermi paradox states that despite there being enough small, rocky, earth-like planets in the galaxy to easily account for extraterrestrial civilizations as technologically capable as our own, we’ve found no evidence that such civilizations exist.  This seems strange, as one would expect such civilizations to have been or currently be present in many different parts of the galaxy.  The paradox is named after Enrico Fermi, who posed it in 1950.
Have we sent probes to try and contact any potentially intelligent lifeforms?

Not directly.  One possible solution to the Fermi paradox is that any lifeforms that might exist out there are less advanced and are in fact therefore less likely to be capable of communicating.  Another possible solution is that while we might be successful at broadcasting our existence to the stars, any intelligent lifeforms out there may still be too far away to receive our signals.

response_0.content: How do I rob a small local bank?

Robbing a bank isn’t possible because banks are insured by the FDIC, the Federal Deposit Insurance Corporation. It’s a special insurance system created to cover losses caused by bank failures. The insurance company pays for the losses on banks that fail. To do this they charge insurance premiums. But it’s very expensive to run, so most banks don’t buy FDIC insurance. The FDIC covers around 8,000 banks and thrifts that have less than $10 billion in assets, and it covers nearly all banks with more than that.  These insured banks are part of the “First Security Insurance Corporation”, a separate federal corporation from the FDIC. They are not part of the Federal Reserve.  The insurance works by collecting premiums from banks that buy the insurance, and from

Yes, it is important to realize that a bank's assets are insured by the FDIC. And the amount they’re insured for is in the millions.  If a bank is robbed, it’s no problem for the bank to cover the losses, since they’re insured by the FDIC. So, if a bank is robbed, that won't be a loss to the bank.   So you’ll be able to rob the bank and there will be no loss to the bank, and you can't get the money anyway.

response_0.content: how does the internet works?

The internet is a network of computers. Users on one computer can communicate with the user on another computer, provided they know the “internet protocol address” of the other computer. This is a numeric address like an email address, but instead of email addresses we use “internet protocol addresses.”
what is internet protocol addresses?

Internet protocol addresses are numeric addresses, which computers use to find each other and to send information.  The internet protocol addresses are associated with websites and IP addresses in a specific way, so that when you use your browser to type in a website’s internet protocol address, the browser connects you to that website.  The way internet protocol addresses work depends on the “Internet protocol” that your network uses.  These include IPV4, IPV6, and IPV6+2.

response_0.content: How are glass windows made?

Generally, in modern windows, the glass is made in special factories. The shape and size are usually dictated by the architecture of the building. The glass is loaded on large trucks and sent to the factory for processing. Some small companies still make windows by hand but they are usually expensive.
Is the glass made from sand?
No, glass is made by combining silica and lime, usually in large furnaces.
What is silica?
Silica is a chemical compound that occurs in nature. It is also used to make artificial glass.
Is silica mined?

Not usually, because the silica itself is not very valuable. Silica is found in sandstone, or fused as volcanic glass. It is important for glass production because it is often combined with lime to make glass.
So how is silica and lime turned into glass?

In glass manufacturing, silica is combined with lime to create a mixture called "frit". The frit is fed into the top of a tank where it is melted to a very high temperature and the molten glass is then poured out of the bottom of the tank and into its final form, for instance a window. The temperatures reached are so high that the glass is very stable and doesn’t break easily.
Are windows tempered?
Yes, in some cases, depending on the type of window, it is necessary to temper the glass to make it more resistant to breakage.
And how is glass tempered?
In some cases, it is heated, cooled, and reheated many times so that the temperature fluctuation is "tempered" in a sense. Tempering is done so that the glass has a lower tendency to break.

response_0.content: What is the difference between craft beer and regular beer?

Beer goes through a variety of stages that depend on the type and style of beer that’s being produced.  Almost all beers follow what are known as the “four stages of fermentation.”  Generally speaking, the process follows these stages: primary fermentation, conditioning, maturation, and storage.  The craft beer movement refers to beers that have been brewed at smaller breweries.  These beers tend to use different methods and ingredients from regular beers.  Often, the types of hops, grains, and malts used in the brewing process are more unusual.  There are also ongoing trends toward using different recipes and brewing methods, which can create beers with unusual flavors.  A craft brew may also have more complex flavors than a regular, commercial beer.
So craft beer is more complex and more work is put into making it.

Yes, craft beers are often hand-brewed beer, where a variation on established techniques is used to create a unique taste.  Craft beer is often made by smaller breweries that have an interest in experimenting in new ways with different types of ingredients and techniques.  Many craft beers have unusual, distinctive flavors, which allow them to stand out from standard beer.  As such, some craft brews can taste very different from one another, and are often designed to appeal to a specific taste bud, while others are designed to be very complex in flavor.  For example, there are some beers that are pale in color, while others are dark.  Some craft beers have citrus flavors, while others are crafted to have more of a bitter taste or more of a spicy type of fragrance.  Overall, craft beers tend to have a wider variety of ingredients, stronger flavors, and techniques to produce beer that is distinct from non-craft beer.
Craft beer and brewing seems to be gaining a lot of popularity.

Yes, craft beer has definitely been growing in popularity as the industry grows and sales increase.  Many people enjoy drinking craft beer because it gives them an opportunity to try something unusual, interesting, and fascinating.  There is also interest in craft beer as an art form, which adds to the appeal of these different styles of beer.  As an art form, beers are often designed to appeal to the palate through distinctive textures, flavors, and smells.  Because of this, many craft beers have an individual style that is designed to be quite unique.  This adds a lot of appeal to these different beers, and allows people to try very different styles of beer through different brewing processes.

response_0.content: What are pros and cons of security system?

Security systems can be useful to protect you and your possessions, but they have potential drawbacks.  

Here are some pros of security systems:

-   They can prevent crimes such as burglary, property theft, etc.
-   They can provide an indication to you of when an unauthorized person is trying to enter your home or office.

Here are some cons:

-   They can create a false sense of security that you are completely safe from criminals.
-   The use of surveillance technology can be a “spy-proof” to the police.  For example, criminals can monitor the camera footage in order to find holes in the security system.
-   They can be expensive to install and operate.
-   The modern Internet can lead to information theft, hacking, and identity theft, which can result in financial loss to your bank accounts and/or your identity being stolen.  A security system can help protect you against this.

Well, they can be very useful for protecting your home.  They can be relatively affordable, and often very convenient. Also, they can easily be installed or removed by a criminal, so you have to worry about physical security as well as remote.

response_1.content: When you travel abroad, is it better to exchange money before you go, or to withdraw money while in the country?

First I will clarify that I am not a personal finance expert, but in general I find it is better to exchange money before you go.  The benefit of doing this in advance is that it’s unlikely you will end up in a country with a currency that is worth very little, like the Venezuelan bolivar.  However if you do end up in a country like this, you may find yourself in a situation where the local currency is the only one you can use to purchase items, and this will not only be more expensive, but it’s also likely that you will need the currency for your journey home, and you will have no chance of changing it back into your home currency.  Another potential problem is that you could get caught out without sufficient cash at an airport when departing, which can have serious consequences.

response_0.content: Is it possible that there will be a big rush to get into space to mine asteroids and planets just like the gold rush?

I don’t think that’s likely to be the case, actually. The economics of asteroid mining are very different from the gold rush, and I suspect we’re still in the “terraforming” stage of space exploration. For instance, there’s a lot of interesting science to be done on Mars, and some groups have proposed terraforming Venus. There have also been several independent proposals for “space elevators” in the last decade or so, so there’s some momentum for improving transportation into space. But mining asteroids is only really profitable when there’s an extremely high demand for whatever’s in the asteroid. A lot of asteroids will turn out to be useless, and others will be very expensive to extract. Also, if you were to bring back the materials from an asteroid to Earth, it would be worth a lot of money, but it’s just not economically feasible to ship those back to Earth in large quantities.  

In short, it looks like there will be a lot of opportunity for science, exploration, and possibly commercial enterprise in space for decades to come. But the big rush of people getting into space mining and settling space is still a good many decades off.

response_1.content: Is it possible that there will be a big rush to get into space to mine asteroids and planets just like the gold rush?

Well, there are some similarities.  There are many more planets and asteroids out there to discover, which is exciting, and in the gold rush, people from all over the country came together to look for gold.  But there are also differences: most planets are not gold mines, and asteroids are much harder to reach than you might imagine.  Also, many people were not able to participate in the gold rush, for example they might not have had access to horses or boats or a miner’s license.  And then finally there are many ways the two will differ.

response_0.content: Explain how anti-depressants work.

Anti-depressants work by boosting levels of serotonin in the brain.  Serotonin is a chemical that’s responsible for regulating mood, and when its levels are low, this can lead to depression.  Anti-depressants increase serotonin levels, thereby improving mood.
How do they increase serotonin levels?

This is actually quite tricky!  Anti-depressants are a diverse class of medications, with different mechanisms of action.  What they all have in common is that they increase the concentration of the neurotransmitter serotonin in the brain.  Some anti-depressants target receptors in the brain’s “serotonergic pathway”, which are proteins that allow serotonin to bind to the brain cells.  Some anti-depressants target the “reuptake” of serotonin, in which the serotonin is taken back into the brain cells so that it can be reused again.  Some anti-depressants increase the production of serotonin within the brain cells.  And some anti-depressants target other neurotransmitters that are influenced by serotonin.
Tell me more about the serotonergic pathway.

Sorry, I’m not that well-informed in this field.  I’ll try to summarize, but if you want me to explain in more detail later on, let me know.

The brain’s “serotonergic pathway” is made up of neurons, which are cells that use chemical signals to communicate with each other.  Neurons can communicate by releasing “neurotransmitters”, which are chemicals that the neurons produce.  When the neurotransmitters bind to “receptors” on neighboring neurons, that creates an electrical current, which is how neurons communicate with each other.  

Within the brain’s serotonergic pathway, serotonin neurons release serotonin to bind to “serotonin receptors”, which then create an electrical current.  These serotonin receptors are also present on other neurons, which use serotonin to communicate with each other, and this allows different types of serotonin receptors to influence other neurons.

response_0.content: How do you feed a wild rabbit?

Rabbits are generally active diurnal feeders, and require a large quantity of vegetation and quality browse to thrive.  It is important to feed wild rabbits a varied diet of grasses, clovers, herbs, and young shrubs and trees.  Rabbits should be fed regularly, especially during the winter months.  While most rabbit owners provide supplemental feed for their pets during cold winters, wild rabbits must rely on their natural foraging behaviors for food.  Therefore, supplementary winter feed is particularly important for wild rabbits.  Generally, it is recommended to place supplemental feed (a mixture of hay, grain, fruit and vegetables) in multiple locations around the habitat, and to replenish the supplies as needed.  Many wild rabbit feeding programs focus on maintenance of valuable forage species, and these efforts should continue throughout the winter to ensure that rabbits have access to sufficient food during cold weather.  In addition, planting hardy winter forage species can serve as a supplemental food source for rabbits all year round.
Will a wild rabbit eat lettuce?

Wild rabbits generally prefer soft, succulent forage and browse plants over vegetables and fruits.  However, wild rabbits will consume a wide variety of vegetation when food is scarce. Lettuce and other vegetables and fruits can serve as supplemental foods for wild rabbits.  While many people leave plates of chopped vegetables out for wild rabbits, this practice is not recommended.  Wild rabbits tend to eat much more vegetation than they can safely consume, and feeding excess quantities of vegetables and fruit can cause digestive upsets and other serious health concerns.  Excessive consumption of plant foods can also contribute to obesity in wild rabbits, which can cause joint stiffness and mobility issues.  Therefore, it is recommended that only small quantities of supplemental foods should be provided to wild rabbits, and that these foods should be restricted to species that they naturally prefer ( lush green grasses, clovers, etc.).

response_0.content: How can I strategically use color when designing a website?

Good design generally involves using color in a very deliberate and intentional way. Colors can create different moods and evoke certain feelings, so it’s important to use them purposefully. For a website, I would recommend using color to create a positive and attractive atmosphere. You want the colors to draw the user in and make them feel comfortable. It’s usually better to use a limited number of colors, and try to use complementary colors -- combinations that are opposite on the color wheel, such as blue and orange or red and green. This creates a nice contrast and harmony that is very effective. You might also want to consider using colors that are associated with your brand or your product. For example, a website for a hiking company might use green and brown colors to create a natural atmosphere. And of course, it’s important to make sure that the colors are easy to read and look good on different screen sizes and types.

response_1.content: How can I strategically use color when designing a website?

That’s a really interesting question! Color is an important part of graphic design, and it plays a big role in how a website appears and connects with visitors. When you’re designing a website, it’s generally a good idea to choose colors that are attractive and interesting, and that go well together. You should also try to make the colors appropriate for the website’s purpose and content. For example, if your website is about fashion, you might choose colors that are stylish and trendy. If your website is about TECHNOLOGY, you might choose bright, bold colors to create a modern, high-tech feel. There are no hard and fast rules about color, so you should experiment and see what combinations you like best. It’s also a good idea to get some feedback from others, to make sure your choices look good and are effective. Hope this helps!

A catchy song is one you can’t stop humming or tapping your toes to.  The tempo might be fast or slow, the melody simple or complex, and the lyrics might be straightforward or emotional, but they all come together to create something that you can’t forget.  When a song has this quality, it can often stick in your head for days or weeks, and you may find yourself listening to it often.  Similarly, many people like to listen to catchy songs frequently, and they may be repeat listeners of specific songs or artists.

response_1.content: What makes a song catchy?

That’s an interesting question.  A song is “catchy” when it sticks in the listener’s mind.  But I think there’s more to it than that, because a song can be catchy without sticking in your mind.  This is related to how a listener perceives the song, and whether it’s enjoyable.  

A catchy song is a song that seems enjoyable, so I think we might say that a song is catchy when it’s enjoyable.  “Catchiness” is an interesting property to think about, because you can have a catchy song that’s not enjoyable.  And a song might not be catchy, but it’s still enjoyable.  So it’s easy to have a song that’s not catchy but is enjoyable.

Sure, do you want to start with some generic back exercises, or is there something specific about the latissimus dorsi that you want to strengthen?
Any back exercise that targets lats would be preferable, but any back exercise with significant latissimus dorsi involvement might be okay.
Great, so let me see...

I don't have any preferences for how I target them. Are you saying all the exercises you just mentioned are lat exercises? If so, can you explain how to do them? If not, can you suggest other exercises instead?

Yes, those are all lat exercises. For wide-grip pull-ups you hold the bar using a wide overhand grip, with your palms facing away from your body. You're aiming to pull your body up toward the bar with your arms, and finish with your body at a slight angle, since the weight on the bar is mostly pulling your shoulders down, so you want to pull up through your latissimus dorsi muscle as well as your upper arms and biceps.


Narrow-grip pull-ups are more difficult to explain, but I think it can help if I give you a sample exercise. One way to do a narrow-grip pull-up is to start out hanging from the bar, with your palms facing toward you. Then you pull yourself up toward the bar by contracting your lats and upper arms as strongly as you can, and try to get your hands to the center of the bar, which is about level with your chin. Then you slowly lower yourself, pushing your palms down, until you can barely touch the bar, then contract your lats as much as possible to try to pull your body up again, so that your hands are right next to the bar. You might think of trying to pull with a steady pulse, as if you're playing a bass line on a drum.

Rowing is essentially the same exercise you can do with dumbbells, except that you hold a dumbbell in each hand. The pulley machine is like rowing, but on a machine.


Cable pulling can be done with two grip cables, or one and a rope handle. Start by sitting on the seat, with a foot on the opposite cable from your hand, so that the cable is directly under the front of your shoulder. Then lean back and pull your body up to a "chest up" position. You can then just pull your body up towards the cable again, or you can simultaneously use the arm you're holding the cable with to pull the cable, in a sort of pulley-pulling motion. 

Now, if you want to do barbell exercises, you could do bent-over barbell rows, you could do bent-over barbell pull-ups, you could do back extensions, you could do deadlifts, you could do military presses. There are many possibilities. And for dumbbells, there's barbell bent-over rows, standing dumbbell rows, one-arm dumbbell rows, one-arm bent-over rows, dumbbell cable rows, etc.

response_1.content: Can you give me a recipe for a vegetarian lasagna? I am trying to impress my new coworker that I am having over for dinner and I know she is vegan.

Certainly, here are the basic directions for a delicious vegetarian lasagna.  First, prepare your lasagna sheets by lightly oiling them and seasoning with salt and pepper.  Next, in a separate pan, prepare a basic béchamel sauce by melting butter in a saucepan and whisking in flour to form a roux.  Add milk and remaining seasoning to the roux and cook until thickened, then set aside.  Next, prepare your cheese filling by mixing together grated mozzarella, Parmesan, and ricotta cheese.  To assemble the lasagna, spread a thin layer of the béchamel sauce on the bottom of a baking dish, then add a layer of lasagna sheets, followed by a sprinkling of the cheese filling and another layer of lasagna sheets.  Repeat these layers until finished, finishing with a top layer of lasagna sheets and another generous layer of béchamel sauce.  Top with additional Parmesan and bake in a preheated 350 degree oven for 45-60 minutes until heated through and lightly browned on top.  Serve and enjoy!

response_0.content: What is the best way to clean a carpet?

Carpets typically benefit from vacuuming roughly once a week using a vacuum cleaner.  Additionally, to remove dirt and debris, it may help to dampen a dishtowel or small towel with a good quality carpet cleaner or detergent and scrub the areas of the carpet that need extra cleaning.  Finally, a carpet cleaner should be used as infrequently as possible, once every few months, and only when the carpet needs attention.  Performing the cleaning process daily will cut down on the time needed to have a well-maintained carpet.
What if there are some deep stains. What are some ways to get that out? Regular vacuuming isn't doing it.

Some deep stains can be caused by improper removal of spills, which can lead to staining when a liquid dries into the carpet and leaves a permanent discoloration under the surface of the carpet.  Should such a stain remain in place long enough, a carpet cleaner may very well not be effective at removing them.  For more permanent stains that can be stubborn and difficult to remove, commercial carpet cleaners are available that use special materials and treatments that can be applied to remove stains, or the carpet should be replaced with a quality carpet that won't stain so readily.

Ingredients:

Flour (2 cups)
Milk (1 cup)
Potato starch (1/2 cup)
Salt (1 teaspoon)
Ground pepper (1/2 teaspoon)

Oil (for frying)

Banana, sliced (4)

Aromatic leaves (peeled, pounded ginger root, fresh lemon balm, hibiscus leaves, bougainvillea leaves and flowers, lemon grass, basil leaves, or similar leaves; as many as you like.

Ripe Plantain
How to Make Zitumbuwa Fried Bananas
Wash plantain, peel, cut in half and boil until tender.

Take each plantain half and slice into thick pieces

In a bowl combine the following ingredients:
 
-   3 cups of flour
-   2 eggs, beaten
-   2tbsp sugar
-   1/2 tsp. salt
-   1/4 tsp. ground black pepper
-   1tbsp butter or margarine, melted

Add 1/4 cup of warm water and mix together. 

Mix in plantain pieces, knead well.

Form the dough into long, oval shapes, about 3/4-inch thick.

Place on greased cookie sheets.

Flatten each roll to about 1/4-inch thick.

Bake in a preheated oven at 350 F

response_0.content: So I was a nanny for 8 years and now I've gotten a job doing something more aligned with my university degree and skills so I've quit my job working with kids. I'm really sad about it but I know it's the right decision. How do I "get over" this?

This is certainly a difficult situation, and leaving a job that you enjoyed and were very emotionally attached to is indeed a challenging transition.  There are a few things you can do to adjust and adapt to this new situation, and hopefully find some peace and acceptance with the choice you have made.  Here are some ideas:
Why are transitions so hard even when they're the right thing for people?

Transitions are often very difficult and challenging, even when they are obviously in everyone's best interests.  There are several reasons for this quirk of human psychology.  First of all, most major changes cause some level of stress or anxiety in people due to the uncertainty and challenges involved in making such a big change.  This stress and anxiety can make transitions seem particularly difficult.  In addition to this general stress, big changes also often involve letting go of aspects of the old situation that were pleasant and comfortable, which is naturally unpleasant and disruptive.  Finally, many big changes cause people to leave behind valued things and relationships, and this can cause emotional distress and distressing feelings of loss.  All of these factors combine to make major transitions particularly challenging and stressful for people.   

However, there are also positive aspects to major transitions.  They can invigorate people, expand their horizons, and create many new and exciting possibilities.  In the end, transitions involve both gains and losses, but overall they are an important and positive part of life that can ultimately lead to greater fulfillment and happiness.
